description: U.S. Department of Labor graphic on a dark navy and black background. The top is a close-up photograph of President Donald Trump speaking in the Oval Office, with American flags and gold drapery blurred behind him; he wears a dark suit with a red tie and a flag lapel pin. Across the middle in large bold white serif type is the text 'AMERICANS FIRST'. Below is a white rounded-rectangle card formatted as an embedded X post from 'Rapid Response 47' (@RapidResponse47, with a blue verified check and small profile logo). The quoted post text reads: 'Since President Trump took office (Jan.-Sep. 2025): 2,57M native-born Americans GAINED employment; 1.03M foreign-born workers LOST employment. 2.64M native-born Americans JOINED the labor force; 1.23M foreign-born workers LEFT the labor force.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST | Rapid Response 47 @RapidResponse47: Since President Trump took office (Jan.-Sep. 2025): 2.57M native-born Americans GAINED employment; 1.03M foreign-born workers LOST employment...
